items.title: Terraform Basics
items.text: Minimal examples and notes to learn Terraform and infrastructure-as-code.

items.title: Overview
items.text: This repository contains small, focused Terraform examples and modules to demonstrate common patterns and workflows.

items.title: Prerequisites
items.text:
• Terraform (1.5+ recommended)
  • Git
  • (Dev container) Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS

items.title: Quick start
items.text:
# from repository root
cd /workspaces/terraform-basics

# initialize providers & modules
terraform init

# format, validate, plan, and apply
terraform fmt
terraform validate
terraform plan -out=plan.tfplan
terraform apply "plan.tfplan"

To destroy: 

terraform destroy

items.title: Recommended workflow
items.text:
• Keep each example/module in its own directory.
  • Use workspaces or separate state backends per environment.
  • Review terraform plan before apply.
  • Store secrets outside of repo (e.g., environment variables, secret manager).

items.title: Project layout (example)
items.text:
• /examples — example configurations
  • /modules — reusable Terraform modules
  • /docs — documentation (see docs/index.md)
  • main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf — root-level configs (if present)

items.title: Documentation
items.text: See docs/index.md for authoring tips and site content.

items.title: Contributing
items.text: Open an issue or PR. Follow standard Git workflow and run terraform fmt and terraform validate before submitting.

items.title: License
items.text: Check repository LICENSE file for details.

items.title: Headers
items.text:
# H1 Header
## H2 Header
### H3 Header
#### H4 Header
##### H5 Header
###### H6 Header

items.title: Text formatting
items.text:
**bold text**
*italic text*
***bold and italic***
~~strikethrough~~
`inline code`

items.title: Links and images
items.text:
[Link text](https://example.com)
[Link with title](https://example.com "Hover title")
![Alt text](image.jpg)
![Image with title](image.jpg "Image title")

items.title: Lists
items.text:
Unordered:
- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item

Ordered:
1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

items.title: Blockquotes
items.text:
> This is a blockquote
> Multiple lines
>> Nested quote

items.title: Code blocks
items.text:
```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

items.title: Tables
items.text:
| Header 1 | Header 2 | Header 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Row 1    | Data     | Data     |
| Row 2    | Data     | Data     |

items.title: Horizontal rule
items.text:
---
or
***
or
___

items.title: Task lists
items.text:
- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Incomplete task
- [ ] Another task

items.title: Escaping characters
items.text: Use backslash to escape: \* \_ \# \`

items.title: Line breaks
items.text:
End a line with two spaces  
to create a line break.

Or use a blank line for a new paragraph.
